backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Namma Driver Pilot backend; defines all core types (UserProfile, Trip, TripRequest, PricingConfig, etc.) and implements business logic for trip management, user roles, and access control using stable storage maps and sets.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature: converting plain role strings to Candid opt variant format before submitting to the backend, affecting RoleSelectionWarningModal.tsx and useQueries.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing a JSON map of per-file summaries for all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, and page in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot', mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router; defines all routes with auth guards (AuthGate, ProtectedRoute) and role-based guards (RoleGuard) for customer, driver, and admin dashboards, plus a shared RootLayout with profile setup modal and offline banner.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI tab displaying a searchable, paginated table of all trips with status badges and fare display, reading discriminated union fields using the variant-object pattern (e.g., '#requested' in s).
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, filterable table of all users with their name, email, role badge, and join date, fetched via the useGetAllUsers hook.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps protected routes and waits up to 5 seconds for Internet Identity to resolve, redirecting unauthenticated users to /login and showing a spinner while checking.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of requested trips available for drivers to accept, with pickup/dropoff details and an accept button that calls the useAcceptTrip mutation.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with status badges, vehicle type, pickup/dropoff locations, and timestamps fetched via useGetMyTrips.
frontend/src/components/DataLoadErrorBan: Displays a dismissible error banner with a refresh button when data fails to load, styled with destructive colors.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Shows a driver's profile card including service area, total earnings, vehicle experience badges, transmission comfort, and duty/locked status.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Renders a driver's trip list with status badges, location details, fare, and a complete-trip button for accepted trips using the useCompleteTrip mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: A form component for editing a driver's profile, including service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, languages, and availability toggle, with save/update mutations.
A modal dialog wrapper around EditDriverProfileForm for editing driver profile details.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with retry and reset options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A page layout component that wraps content with a sticky Navigation header and a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A sticky top navigation bar with the app logo, user account dropdown (showing profile, role, dashboard link, and logout), and login state handling.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: A dismissible sticky banner that alerts users when the backend is unreachable.
frontend/src/components/PricingTab.tsx: An admin UI tab for viewing and updating pricing configuration (local, outstation, vehicle multipliers, commissions) with flat form state helpers and mutation support.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time profile setup, collecting the user's full name and email and saving via mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and renders children only when authenticated.
A form component for creating ride/trip requests, supporting local/outstation trip types, GPS or manual pickup location, vehicle selection, and scheduling, which submits via the useCreateTrip mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: A route guard component that verifies the authenticated user's role and either renders children, shows a NotAuthorizedPage, or redirects to /select-role or /login based on the required role.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: A dialog modal that prompts newly authenticated users to select either a customer or driver role, then navigates them to the appropriate dashboard after saving the role via the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealth.ts: A hook that performs a health check against the backend actor with a 10-second timeout and returns whether the backend is healthy along with loading/error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor using React Query, exposing loading and fetched state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across page reloads and exposing login/logout/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks and mutations for backend interactions including role management, admin checks, pricing config, trip creation, and user profile fetching, with timeout wrappers and Candid variant conversion utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/lib/defaultConfig.ts: Exports a DEFAULT_CONFIG constant of type PricingConfig used as a fallback when the backend pricing configuration is unavailable or loading.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines all shared domain TypeScript types (AppRole, TripStatus, UserProfile, Trip, etc.) and a helper function getRoleString to extract a role string from a Candid optional variant.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying identity info, user/trip stats, and tabbed sections for managing users, trips, and pricing configuration.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page that allows a user to enter a setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role, navigating to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing the user's principal ID, a ride request form, and a list of their trips in a two-column layout.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page displaying the driver's profile, availability status, and tabbed views for available trips and their own trip history, with an edit profile modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Root landing page that acts as a client-side router, redirecting unauthenticated users to login and authenticated users to their appropriate dashboard based on role.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page with an Internet Identity sign-in button, redirecting authenticated users to the post-login landing page.
frontend/src/pages/NotAuthorizedPage.tsx: Displays a 'Not Authorized' error page with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the home route.
Fetches the user's role after login and redirects to the appropriate dashboard (admin, customer, driver) or role-selection page, showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/SelectRolePage.tsx: Allows a newly authenticated user to select a role (customer or driver), calls the setMyRole mutation, and redirects to the corresponding dashboard; also handles logout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/src/utils/withTimeout.ts: Wraps a promise with a configurable timeout, rejecting with a custom TimeoutError if the timeout expires before the promise resolves.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and known architectural notes, specifically documenting the fix to convert plain string roles to Candid opt variant format before sending to the ICP backend.
